scoringPlays.text: Kirby Vorhees 2 Yd Run (Jack Stevens Kick)
Trey Leckner 1 Yd pass from Zevi Eckhaus (Two-Point Run Conversion Failed)
Zevi Eckhaus 5 Yd Run (Two-Point Pass Conversion Failed)
Trent Walker 12 Yd pass from Tristan Ti'a (Jake Reichle Run for Two-Point Conversion)
Angel Johnson 2 Yd Run (Jack Stevens Kick)

videos.headline: Kirby Vorhees powers through for the TD
videos.description: Kirby Vorhees muscles his way to the end zone to give Washington State the first TD of the game vs. Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kirby Vorhees powers through for the TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington State adds to leads with short TD
videos.description: Zevi Eckhaus tosses it up to Trey Leckner in the end zone to give Washington State a two touchdown lead vs. Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington State adds to leads with short TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Zevi Eckhaus runs it in for a 5-yard TD
videos.description: Zevi Eckhaus takes it up the middle to the end zone and Washington keeps on rolling.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zevi Eckhaus runs it in for a 5-yard TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Angel Johnson crosses the plane for a short TD
videos.description: Angel Johnson extends Washington State's lead with a 2-yard rushing TD in the fourth quarter vs. Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Angel Johnson crosses the plane for a short TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
